title: Araghchi condemns US 'reckless military adventure' — 'Iranians never bow to pressure'
snippet: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said 'Iranians never bow to pressure' and 'every time a diplomatic solution is on the table, the U.S. opts for a reckless military adventure.' Statement came after US disabled 2 Iranian tankers and following exchanges of fire in Hormuz.
tag_reason: 아라그치의 'reckless military adventure' 비난은 5/8 신규 성명.
